name: The Overflow Lesson
description: Starter hands-on scenario in Verdant Heartwood biome. Teaches through realistic consequence that abundance is tended through rhythmic, observant, merciful interaction with the living web — not extracted. Builds transferable muscle memory for sustainable real-life patterns and natural epiphanies. v18.7 adds explicit CB1 (insight/hypofrontality/muscle memory) and CB2 (resilience/recovery/abundance) receptor bloom triggers on the sustainable path.

conditions.name: over_harvest_path
conditions.description: Player harvests too aggressively or without attunement to regen cues.

conditions.name: sustainable_path
conditions.description: Player observes, rotates zones, leaves seed areas, matches harvest rhythm to visible regen particles and animal responses. Now also builds toward CB1/CB2 receptor bloom when rhythm + duration + attunement thresholds met.

over_harvest.whisper_message: The living web slows when rhythm is broken... Patience and attunement multiply what returns to all.
over_harvest.epiphany_seed: Abundance is not taken — it is tended.
over_harvest.grace_note: Mercy available: pause, reflect, adjust pacing — the forest remembers and forgives.

sustainable.whisper_message: Your presence blooms the forest. Abundance flows when you tend the whole web.
sustainable.epiphany_unlock: Abundance is not taken — it is tended. My patience and attunement multiply what returns.
sustainable.grace_note: Epiphany moment achieved. Muscle memory seeded for real life.

notes: v18.7: Receptor Activation Forge fully wired. Sustainable path now explicitly seeds conditions for CB1 (revelatory insight, hypofrontality, muscle memory) + CB2 (resilience, recovery, abundance bloom) differentiated effects. Over-harvest path has no receptor bloom (realistic consequence). Full mercy-gated, organic epiphany catalyst. Starter for all future ecological, social, flow-state, and council lessons. Designed for organic discovery, zero coercion, maximum wholesome transfer to real thriving.
